name: FAQs page
prompt: Using the UAE Design System (AEGOV DLS), build the complete FAQs page of a UAE ministry website as a single standalone HTML page. The page needs: the standard government header and footer; breadcrumb navigation; a page-title banner; frequently asked questions grouped into expandable/collapsible items with accessible controls; and everything else a standard UAE government page is expected to carry.

requiredPatterns.pattern: did you find this content useful
requiredPatterns.why: page-rating block is standard furniture on every TDRA template
